mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tiktok_accounts ( advertiser_id, advertiser_name, access_token, refresh_token, token_expires_at, currency, timezone, balance, status ) VALUES ( #{advertiserId}, #{advertiserName}, #{accessToken}, #{refreshToken}, #{tokenExpiresAt}, COALESCE(#{currency}, 'USD'), COALESCE(#{timezone}, 'UTC'), COALESCE(#{balance}, 0), COALESCE(#{status}, 'active') ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE advertiser_name = VALUES(advertiser_name), access_token = VALUES(access_token), refresh_token = VALUES(refresh_token), token_expires_at = VALUES(token_expires_at), currency = VALUES(currency), timezone = VALUES(timezone), balance = VALUES(balance), status = VALUES(status), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tiktok_accounts WHERE advertiser_id = #{advertiserId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tiktok_accounts WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE tiktok_accounts SET access_token = #{accessToken}, refresh_token = #{refreshToken}, token_expires_at = #{tokenExpiresAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE advertiser_id = #{advertiserId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tiktok_accounts WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tiktok_accounts ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE tiktok_accounts SET advertiser_name = #{advertiserName}, access_token = #{accessToken}, refresh_token = #{refreshToken}, token_expires_at = #{tokenExpiresAt}, currency = #{currency}, timezone = #{timezone}, balance = COALESCE(#{balance}, balance), status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tiktok_accounts SET balance = #{balance}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE advertiser_id = #{advertiserId}
